title: Problem with rtree tables with IN() operators or as the inner loop of a join.
poc: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE t3 USING rtree(Pid, xmin, xmax);
SELECT * FROM t3 WHERE Pid IN (1, 2);
key_bug_features: Rtree tables with IN() operators or join conditions
bug_features_seed: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE t4 USING rtree(Pid, xmin, xmax);
SELECT * FROM t4 WHERE Pid IN (1, 2);
WITH r(x) AS (SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT NULL) SELECT * FROM r CROSS JOIN t4 WHERE Pid = x;
